project.name: Music Notation Expressivity
project.description: Performance side-channels — per-track timelines for volume, articulations, pedaling, velocity, and other instrument-specific expressivity layers. Keyed by TrackId; sparse + canonical at construction. Composed by MidiCodec at emission time. Sits below notation-performance so any dimension that's "how the piece is played" rather than "what's notated" lands here.
